executiveSummary.dobConstraint: 328 players are P12 (UNKNOWN_DOB). DOB alone unlocks RANKED only when verified games ≥ threshold (8 boys / 6 girls). 13 U19 Girls and 175 U19 Boys already meet game threshold but remain blocked; U19 Girls board is empty (0 RANKED). Imports without DOB shift players P7→P12 rather than clearing blockers — coordinate DOB batches (NU/UST Girls first) with high-ROI imports (PYBC 15U).
